basic_details.job_title: VNSGU Temporary Guest Scholar Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Veer Narmad South Gujarat University (VNSGU) Recruitment 2026: Veer Narmad South Gujarat University has released the official notification for 1 Temporary Guest Scholar posts, inviting applications from eligible candidates in Gujarat. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for candidates seeking stable and well-paid government jobs.

age_limit.age_details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.
age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: Master's Degree with at least 55% marks from an Indian University in a relevant/allied subject such as Jain Studies, Religious Studies, Indian Knowledge Systems (IKS), Hindu Studies, Sanskrit, Indian Philosophy, Indian Culture, or related disciplines and Minimum 3 Years of Teaching experience/ Religious Activities/ Ideology/ Jain Tradition.
qualification.details: Master's Degree with at least 55% marks from an Indian University in a relevant/allied subject such as Jain Studies, Religious Studies, Indian Knowledge Systems (IKS), Hindu Studies, Sanskrit, Indian Philosophy, Indian Culture, or related disciplines. Minimum 3 Years of Teaching experience/ Religious Activities/ Ideology/ Jain Tradition.

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 07-08-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of VNSGU to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: VNSGU Temporary Guest Scholar Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the VNSGU Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download VNSGU Temporary Guest Scholar Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: VNSGU Temporary Guest Scholar Vacancy Details 2026
Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Master's Degree with at least 55% marks from an Indian University in a relevant/allied subject such as Jain Studies, Religious Studies, Indian Knowledge Systems (IKS), Hindu Studies, Sanskrit, Indian Philosophy, Indian Culture, or related disciplines. Minimum 3 Years of Teaching experience/ Religious Activities/ Ideology/ Jain Tradition.

content_sections.heading: Age Limit
content_sections.text: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

content_sections.heading: VNSGU Temporary Guest Scholar Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Applications must be submitted online on or before 07-08-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of VNSGU to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: VNSGU Temporary Guest Scholar Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the VNSGU Temporary Guest Scholar recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to apply online for the VNSGU Temporary Guest Scholar recruitment is 07 August 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well before the deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Temporary Guest Scholar post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Temporary Guest Scholar post at Veer Narmad South Gujarat University.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Master's Degree with at least 55% marks in a relevant or allied subject and have a minimum of 3 years of teaching experience or experience in religious activities/ideology/Jain tradition.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Temporary Guest Scholar position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a salary of Rs. 100000 per month.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application fee for VNSGU recruitment?
faq.answer: There is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q6. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications for the VNSGU Temporary Guest Scholar recruitment must be submitted online.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Temporary Guest Scholar post?
faq.answer: The selection process will be conducted by a Selection Committee.

faq.question: Q8. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the Important Links section of this article.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The job type for the Temporary Guest Scholar position is contractual.

faq.question: Q10. Which university is conducting this recruitment?
faq.answer: Veer Narmad South Gujarat University (VNSGU) is conducting this recruitment.
